homePage.title: Save Your Movies
homePage.description: The faintest ink is better than the best memory… but a web app is even better.

homeCards.title: How does it work?
homeCards.createAccountDescription: Sign up on the platform to get your own personal space where you can save and organize your movies.
homeCards.saveMoviesDescription: Easily add the title, year, streaming platform, poster link, and a short synopsis for each movie you want to register.
homeCards.AccesYourCollectionDescription: View and manage your movie list anytime, keeping an organized record of what you have watched or want to watch.

explicationProject.title: Hello, let me introduce myself!
explicationProject.description: This project is a software development practice project created for my personal portfolio. If you find it useful, feel free to use it. The stack includes Vue 3, using Pinia for state management, Vue Router, i18n for internationalization, Tailwind CSS for styling, and TypeScript. For the backend and user authentication, the project uses Supabase, while deployment and hosting are handled through Netlify.
